# Dhiraj Kumar Yadav

Software Engineer based in New Delhi, India.

Primary areas:
- Backend APIs
- MERN stack
- TypeScript
- Node.js and Express.js
- MongoDB and schema design
- AWS developer services
- Test automation
- Distributed monitoring systems

Canonical site: https://dhiraj-yadav.in/
GitHub: https://github.com/ydhiraj811
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ydhiraj811
LeetCode: https://leetcode.com/u/ydhiraj811/

Summary:
Dhiraj Kumar Yadav is a software engineer with experience building backend APIs in Python and Node.js, AWS cloud services, MERN applications, and distributed monitoring systems. He has led test automation work and owns production-facing API work from design through deployment.
